name: griffin-global-lms
description: Griffin Global Technologies — Professional Services LMS

scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
